name: a9_adapter_kernel
outcome_goal: rg 'httpx\.|requests\.|aiohttp\.' Code&DBs/Workflow --type py returns only callsites inside adapters/http_transport.py, and five adapter types converge on this transport.
verify_command: bash -lc "PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q 'Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_adapter_kernel.py' && bad=$(rg 'httpx\.|requests\.|aiohttp\.' 'Code&DBs/Workflow' --type py -l | grep -v 'adapters/http_transport.py' || true); test -z \"$bad\""

jobs.label: a9_adapter_kernel
jobs.prompt: After praxis/kernel-secret lands on public, branch praxis/kernel-adapter from updated public and converge HTTP transport authority. Touched scope: Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/http_transport.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/provider_transport.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/llm_client.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/mcp_task.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/connector_executor.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/webhook.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_adapter_kernel.py. The only direct httpx/requests/aiohttp callsites should be inside adapters/http_transport.py. Five adapter types must use that transport. File decision.2026-04-20.kernel-adapter-consolidation. Verify integration test and grep. Open a PR to public referencing the decision row; do not merge if verifier is red.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q 'Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_adapter_kernel.py' && bad=$(rg 'httpx\.|requests\.|aiohttp\.' 'Code&DBs/Workflow' --type py -l | grep -v 'adapters/http_transport.py' || true); test -z \"$bad\""
